description_long: This is a two-story rectangular house with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a flat roof and a stark color contrast between black and white exterior walls. The front facade is predominantly black, with a white door and several rectangular windows, some of which are grouped together. The side and rear facades are white with a brick texture, and windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. The house sits on a green rectangular base, suggesting a small lawn or yard area. The interior layout is partially visible from above, showing multiple rooms and a mix of wall colors and textures. The overall appearance is clean and geometric, with no visible decorative elements or overhangs.
description: A modern, two-story rectangular house with a flat roof, black and white exterior walls, and asymmetrically arranged windows. The front features a white door and a small green yard.
description_view_0: Front view shows a black facade with a white door, several windows, and a green yard base.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals a white brick wall with two windows and a glimpse of the interior room layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a white brick wall with three windows, including a pair of closely set windows and a single window.
description_view_3: Right side view shows a black wall with two windows and the green yard extending along the side.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple white door with no steps, porch, or decorative elements, set flush with the black facade.
